title: nautilocalyx urticifolius
intro: Nautilocalyx urticifolius, also known as the nettle-leaved Nautilocalyx, is a plant species within the family Boraginaceae, native to New Guinea. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Nautilocalyx urticifolius include its potential to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its leaves can be used topically for various medicinal purposes.
